name: Chocolate Velvet Cheesecake2
recipeIngredient: Cream cheese (2 packages, 8 oz each): softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vanilla wafer crumbs, chopped pecans, granulated sugar, and melted margarine in a bowl. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 10 minutes.
3. In another bowl, beat together the softened cream cheese and brown sugar until well blended. Add one egg at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in the chocolate and amaretto, then pour the mixture over the crust.
4. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 35 minutes.
5. Increase the oven temperature to 425°F (220°C). In a separate bowl, mix together the sour cream and granulated sugar.
6. Carefully spread the mixture over the cheesecake.
7. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill before serving.
9. Garnish with chocolate leaves, if desired.
